name: Geoff Wilson
bio: Geoff Wilson is a survivalist who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the episodes {{ep:Into the Wild}} (2016, Panama) and {{ep:Unhinged}} (2017). Limited public biographical information is available beyond his appearances on the Discovery series.

name: Giovanna Horning
bio: Giovanna Horning (also known as Giovanna Zofia) is a survivalist whose love of the outdoors began as a child hunting, fishing, and backpacking with her father. Though she has no formal bushcraft training, she is drawn to primitive skills out of a deep respect for forests and a desire to live simply. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}.

name: Greg Wells
bio: Greg Wells is a U.S. Army Special Forces veteran from Pleasant View, Tennessee. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2016, most notably the {{ep:Frozen in Fear}} episode set in Canada, where he and his partner battled near-freezing temperatures and moose encounters.

name: Gwen Grimes
bio: Gwen Grimes is a retired police officer turned Alaskan homesteader based in Eagle, Alaska, after a 2014 on-the-job injury ended her law-enforcement career. She runs Wyldwoodz Wilderness Retreat, a nonprofit offering survival training to veterans and first responders. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, and {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}}.

name: Hailey Barber
bio: Hailey Barber is from Roanoke Rapids, North Carolina, where she works as a bartender and personal assistant and occasionally helps with her father's charter fishing business. She was trained in navigation, fire-starting, and survival skills by her Air Force veteran father. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the {{ep:Mile-High Clubbed}} episode set in the Colorado Rockies.

name: Hakim Isler
bio: Hakim Isler is an Army Special Operations veteran, 5th-degree black belt in To-Shin Do Ninjutsu, and primitive survival expert based in Fayetteville, North Carolina, where he owns Elevo Dynamics martial arts gym. Known as "The Black MacGyver," he is one of the nation's most prominent African-American survival instructors. He has appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, and Fox's Kicking & Screaming.

name: Heather Smith
bio: Heather Smith is a tournament angler, fishing guide, and outdoors consultant who runs Heather Smith Outdoors near Lake Sam Rayburn in East Texas. A single mother and published author, she is certified in survival and writes on outdoor empowerment. She has appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, {{series:Naked and Afraid: Castaways}}, and {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}.

name: Heather Werner
bio: Heather Werner is Deputy Director of the Sustainability & Mobility Department for the City of San Diego, with over 15 years in policy and project management. An accomplished adventurer, she has biked across the United States twice and pursued the Seven Summits. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} Season 16 in the {{ep:Odd Man Out}} episode filmed in Zambia.

name: Holly Moss
bio: Holly Moss is from McCall, Idaho, where growing up outdoors made fire-building second nature. She graduated from The College of Idaho and earned a master's degree from the University of Idaho's McCall Outdoor Science School. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the {{ep:No Rain, No Gain}} episode set in the Smoky Mountains of Georgia.

name: Holly Roberts
bio: Holly Roberts is a survivalist who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in two episodes, including the {{ep:Little Person, Big Challenge}} episode set in the Ecuadorian Amazon and a prior challenge in Mexico. She had to be medically extracted from the Ecuador challenge due to a UTI.

name: Holly Simmons
bio: Holly Simmons is a rock-climbing instructor from Fayetteville, North Carolina. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2016, including the {{ep:23 Days}} episode.

name: Honora Bowen
bio: Honora Bowen is an American actress, singer, athlete, and activist born in Chicago and raised in New York and Vermont as a ski racer and snowboarder. She studied theatre and modeling from age seven and later moved to Japan at 17 to pursue Japanese language and martial arts. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, including a controversial challenge in Brazil. Visit honorabowen.com.

name: Iver Johnson
bio: Iver Tronsmo Johnsen is a Norwegian survivalist and three-time Norwegian kickboxing champion from Meraker, Norway, known by the nickname "The Boneless." He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2025 and is associated with the Meraker Mountain Challenge.

name: Jaclin Owen
bio: Jaclin Owen is a paralegal from Northwest Indiana who previously appeared on A&E's 60 Days In, going undercover as an inmate. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the {{ep:Kalahari Cold Front}} episode, surviving 21 days in South Africa's Kalahari Desert.

name: Jaclyn McCaffrey
bio: Jaclyn McCaffrey (also known as Jaclyn Horvath) is a wilderness therapy professional from Mesa, Arizona. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in four episodes between 2013 and 2014, including the {{ep:Jungle Love}} episode filmed in Nicaragua.

name: Jake Johnson
bio: Jake Johnson is an Eagle Scout who grew up developing his survival skills in Iowa. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the {{ep:No Rain, No Gain}} episode in the Smoky Mountains of Georgia, where he made television history by proposing to his girlfriend on camera during the challenge.

name: James Lewis
bio: James Lewis is an architect based in Tallahassee, Florida, originally from Crawfordville, and a 1991 Auburn University architecture graduate. His passion for adventure ranges from fossil hunting to extended survival challenges. He has appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, and {{series:Naked and Afraid: Solo}}.

name: Jamie Frizzell
bio: Jamie "WildMan" Frizzell is a Scottish survivalist, lifeguard, and bushcraft instructor from Kilmarnock, and the first British contestant on the franchise. Inspired as a youth by Bear Grylls, Ed Stafford, and Ray Mears, he posted his own outdoor footage online before being cast on television. He has appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, {{series:Naked and Afraid: Solo}}, and {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}}.

name: Jamie Little
bio: Jamie Little (also known as Jamie Plummer) is a wilderness teacher and former personal trainer who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the {{ep:Rise Above}} episode (Season 5, 2016) filmed in Brazil's Amazon rainforest.

name: Janis Holcombe Board
bio: Janis Holcombe Board is a flight paramedic originally from Stafford County, Virginia. In addition to appearing as a survivalist on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the {{ep:Taste of Their Own Medicine}} episode set in southwestern Guyana, she has worked as a set medic on the production in locations including Louisiana, Peru, Montana, and New Mexico.

name: Jared Guillien
bio: Jared Guillien is a system technician from the Midwest who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2022 {{ep:Battle of the Sexes}} episode, in which two men and two women competed for 21 days in South Africa.

name: Jarrell Banks
bio: Jarrell Banks is a YouTube vlogger and survivalist who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2025 {{ep:Seventeen Stitches}} episode, taking on the challenge while recovering from a snowboarding injury. He documents his outdoor and lifestyle content on his Operation Pure Life YouTube channel.

name: Jason Gassaway
bio: Jason Gassaway is a father of three from Northern California, a former SWAT officer, and a marketing professional who describes himself as an extreme survivalist. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2017, including the {{ep:Eye of the Storm}} episode in which he survived a hurricane-ravaged Belize rainforest.

name: Jason Szabo
bio: Jason Szabo is a survivalist, world traveler, SAG actor, and treasure hunter born in Sanford, Florida and raised in Minnesota. He teaches primitive survival and uses outdoor immersion as therapy for veterans with PTSD, and has appeared in films including Godzilla vs. Kong and Triple Frontier. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the {{ep:Redemption Road}} episode set in Guyana. Visit jasonszabo.com.

name: Jeff Zausch
bio: Jeff Zausch is a Pocatello, Idaho native and master of extreme environments, from deserts and arctic to alpine and tropical. By his early twenties he had summited many of the highest peaks in the Northwest U.S. and become an expert tracker and trapper. He has spent over 121 days nude in the wilderness across multiple seasons of {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, and {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}}, and has also competed on NBC/USA's Snake in the Grass.

name: Jen Taylor
bio: Jennifer Paige Taylor is a graphic designer and mother of three based in Madison, Wisconsin, with a B.A. in Graphic Design and Advertising from the University of Wisconsin-Whitewater. She currently produces at GhP Studio. She has appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, with challenges in Guyana, Bulgaria, and Peru.

name: Jennie Lindsey
bio: Jennie Lindsey is a survivalist who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} Season 16 in the {{ep:Odd Man Out}} episode (2023), in which she joined an all-female team for 21 days in Zambia's Luangwa Valley before a fourth contestant unexpectedly arrived.

name: Jennifer Cochran
bio: Jennifer Cochran appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2015 in the {{ep:Fire on the Mountain}} episode, partnered with outdoorsman Trenton Harper in the mountains of Udhampur, India, where they faced freezing nights and an unexpected wildfire.

name: Jennifer Pearce
note: IG handle belongs to a different NAF survivalist; identity unverified

name: Jered Fanning
bio: Jered Fanning is a survivalist from Idaho who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} with his wife Anna in the {{ep:Honeymoon from Hell}} episode (2020), a 14-day fan challenge filmed in the Philippine jungle that tested their marriage.

name: Jeremy McCaa
bio: Jeremy McCaa is a Louisiana survivalist from Monroe who now lives in Grayson. His skills include hunting, animal tracking, primitive shelter building, and friction fire, honed in the swamps and marshes of the Atchafalaya Basin. He has appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, including {{series:Naked and Afraid XL: Frozen}}.

name: Jeremy Upshaw
bio: Jeremy Upshaw is a Tulsa-born adventurer who lives in Enid, Oklahoma, where he manages The Uniform Stop apparel stores. An alpine climber and long-distance kayaker who has navigated nearly the full length of the Arkansas River, he was recruited for {{series:Naked and Afraid}} Season 10 after producers found his climbing and kayaking posts on social media.

name: Jermaine Jackson
bio: Jermaine Jackson is a survivalist and sales/marketing executive based in San Antonio, Texas, where he works as an acute trainer for 3M's medical solutions division. He famously survived all 21 days in Tennessee's Smoky Mountains during {{ep:Loaded for Bear}} on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, losing 31 pounds, and has also appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid XL: Frozen}}.

name: Jess Cornellier
bio: Jessica Cornellier is from Rockford, Illinois (born in Beloit, Wisconsin) and is a Harlem High School graduate who worked at Murphy's Pub in Rockford. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the episode {{ep:Shaken and Very Stirred}}, filmed in the Philippines.

name: Jesse Everett
bio: Jesse Everett is a {{series:Naked and Afraid}} survivalist who completed a 21-day challenge in the Brazilian savannah alongside partner Wes, featured in the two-part {{ep:Stalked on the Savannah: Part 1}} and {{ep:Stalked on the Savannah: Part 2}}. The pair contended with searing heat, paralyzing wasps, aggressive bees, rattlesnakes, and a territorial jaguar family circling their shelter.

name: Jessica Kayrouz
bio: Jessica Kayrouz is an Indiana-based survivalist, writer, and Indiana University-trained creative who served in the military. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in {{ep:Don't Cave In}} and returned for {{ep:USA vs. World}}, becoming known for befriending a wild baby monkey she named Twig. Her debut novella, A Scout in Mimic Grounds: Breaching the Surface, earned a 5-Star Seal Award from Readers' Favorite in 2018.

name: Joe Brandl
bio: Joe Brandl is a longtime Dubois, Wyoming resident who moved there in 1985 to work for Wyoming Game and Fish. A primitive-skills instructor and University of Nebraska-Lincoln graduate, he became one of the oldest contestants to complete a 21-day {{series:Naked and Afraid}} challenge, filmed in Namibia, and later returned for additional Discovery appearances.

name: Joe Maynard
bio: Joe Maynard is a retired Army helicopter pilot of 20 years who became a full-time knife maker based in Clarksville, Tennessee, where he runs Primitive Grind. He travels the country with a mobile forge crafting knives alongside veterans, and appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in {{ep:In Too Deep}} as an Army veteran dive master.

name: Joe Nichter
bio: Joseph Merlin Nichter is a 20-year U.S. Coast Guard veteran who served on a Canine Explosive Detection Team with his partner Sirius. A self-described 'Feral Wilderness Prophet,' he appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} Season 12 and recently completed a 650-mile trek along the Florida Trail to raise funds and awareness for Warriors in the Wild.

name: Joe Ortlip
bio: Joe Ortlip is a survivalist who uses the handle 'Asian Survivalist,' reflecting his Korean heritage and adoption story that he explored during filming. He has appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} (including {{ep:The Devil's Woods}}) and a Montana-set Season 12 episode, as well as {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}.

name: Joesph Prouse
bio: Joseph Prouse is a U.S. Air Force veteran and public affairs non-commissioned officer in charge with the California Air National Guard's 129th Rescue Wing near Mountain View, California. He completed his 21-day {{series:Naked and Afraid}} challenge in Zambia's Luangwa Valley and later starred across all eight episodes of {{series:Naked and Afraid: Apocalypse}} in 2025.

name: John Hogfoss
bio: John Hogfoss is a {{series:Naked and Afraid}} survivalist who debuted in the Season 16 premiere {{ep:Blood and Money}}, filmed in the jungles of Cabo Corrientes, Jalisco, Mexico, where he and partner Mylee Monks hunted and ate a frog while starving. He has since returned for additional episodes including {{ep:Three Is Not Enough}}.

name: Jolie Kathleen Faulkner
bio: Jolie Kathleen Faulkner, known as Jolie Laroux, is a survivalist, speaker, and beauty entrepreneur from Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, where she runs the self-care brand Just Jolie. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in {{ep:The Beauty and the Bro}} attempting a 14-day fan challenge in the Philippines, and returned in {{ep:Love & Adventure}}.

name: Jon Bonessi
bio: Jon Bonessi is a chef and butcher from Southampton on Long Island, New York. He first completed a 21-day {{series:Naked and Afraid}} challenge in the jungle of Subic Bay in the Philippines, then returned for a 40-day {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} season in South Africa, {{ep:Valley of the Banished}}.

name: Jon Hart
bio: Jon Hart is a photographer and optician from Butler, Pennsylvania, and a Slippery Rock University graduate who works as a naturalist, endurance runner, and youth baseball and Ninja coach. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in {{ep:Threesome}} alongside partner Gwen Grimes.

name: Jonathan Klay
bio: Jonathan Klay is a former U.S. Marine Recon from Los Angeles, California. He was marooned on a Maldivian island for 21 days alongside Alison Teal on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, and returned for the {{ep:Snaketacular}} episode.

name: Jonathan Short
bio: Jonathan Short (credited in later episodes as Jonathan Monroe) is a {{series:Naked and Afraid}} survivalist who appeared in {{ep:The Darkest Hour}} and later in {{ep:The Lost World}}, a fourteen-day survival challenge on the wild coast of South Africa.

name: Jonny Yates
bio: Jonny Yates is a U.S. Army veteran and survivalist who appeared on the Season 18 premiere of {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, {{ep:No Legs, No Problem}}, partnering with double amputee Mandy Horvath for a 21-day challenge in the jungles of Belize.

name: Joshua Bell
bio: Joshua Bell, nicknamed 'Duct Tape Boy,' is a former U.S. Marine Corps Corporal who served in Iraq and Afghanistan and ran a gunsmith business in North Carolina. He chose duct tape as his survival item on the {{ep:Nicaragua Nightmare}} episode of {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, tapping out after five days due to withdrawal from quitting smoking, and shortly after his TV debut he relocated to Syria to fight ISIS.

name: Julia Bulinsky
bio: Julia Bulinsky is a travel and lifestyle creator who debuted on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2022's {{ep:Next Gen Survival}}, a special pairing young-adult children of veteran survivalists for a 21-day Mexican rainforest challenge. She returned in 2024's {{ep:Triple Threat}}, filmed in Colombia.

name: Julian Seekins
bio: Julian Seekins is a {{series:Naked and Afraid}} survivalist who debuted in 2025's {{ep:Mayan Blood Sacrifice}}, in which four survivalists faced 21 days in Mexico's Mayan jungle.

name: Julie Wright
bio: Julie Wright is a professional wilderness survival instructor from Washington whose skills include tanning hides, tracking, plant identification, primitive fire, and CPR. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in four episodes between 2013 and 2014, including {{ep:Breaking Borneo}}, a 21-day challenge in Sabah, Borneo with partner Puma Cabra, and later {{ep:Snaketacular}}.

name: Julio Castano
bio: Julio Castano is a {{series:Naked and Afraid}} survivalist who appeared in four episodes during 2016-2017, including {{ep:Into the Wild}}, {{ep:The Danger Within}}, in which he and partner Tawny endured heat, poisonous spiders, and a persistent black bear in Florida's Seminole Forest.

name: Justin Bullard
bio: Justin Bullard is a firefighter and paramedic from Callahan, Florida who has appeared as a survivalist on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in five episodes between 2014 and 2020, including {{ep:Blood in the Water}}, filmed in the Bahamas with partner Dani Julien.

name: Justin Governale
bio: Justin Governale is a former U.S. Marine Corps scout sniper and Purple Heart recipient who served in Iraq, and is now a growth marketer, stand-up comedian, MMA fighter, and dog rescue advocate based in San Antonio, Texas. He debuted on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in Season 15's {{ep:No Holds Barred}}, filmed in Guyana, and went on to star in {{series:Naked and Afraid: Castaways}}.

name: Justin True
bio: Justin True is a {{series:Naked and Afraid}} survivalist (6'4") who debuted in 2025. More information is available on his official site.

name: Justin Tuell
bio: Justin Tuell is an ICU nurse at North Colorado Medical Center who hunts, fishes, and hikes in the mountains of Colorado, regularly trekking up to two weeks at 100 miles per week while bowhunting elk. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in {{ep:Fan Down}}, attempting a 14-day Nicaraguan jungle challenge alongside Teen Mom star Maci Bookout.

name: Kacie Cleveland
bio: Kacie Cleveland is an athletic trainer and CrossFit gym owner from Bellingham, Washington who is also an endurance athlete; in 2012 she inline-skated across the United States in world-record time. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} for a 21-day Belize challenge alongside Aaron Phillips, losing 14 pounds while completing the trek.

name: Kaiela Hobart
bio: Kaiela Hobart is a survivalist, motorcycle racer, motorcycle sales manager, and arborist who grew up in Lakewood, Washington and now lives in Golden, Colorado. She debuted on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2020's {{ep:21 Miles, 21 Days}} in an African desert, then returned for {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} 'The Proving Grounds' in Colombia and {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}} in 2025.

name: Kaila Cumings
bio: Kaila Cumings is a self-taught custom bladesmith from Keene, New Hampshire who got her start reviewing knives on YouTube before selling her gun and knife collections to teach herself forging. She has appeared as a survivalist on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} five times, forging a new custom knife for each season, and partnered with CRKT to produce the Bugsy fixed-blade.

name: Kaila Donaldson
bio: Kaila Donaldson is a custom knifemaker from Troy, New Hampshire, where she grew up camping and hunting. She runs Iron & Oak knife shop with her husband Justin, and her survival skills include hunting large and small game, tracking, and fishing. She has competed across the {{series:Naked and Afraid}} franchise, including {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, {{series:Naked and Afraid: Solo}}, and {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}}.

name: Kami Elsisie
bio: Kami Elsisie is a paramedic, hunter, and adult-onset outdoorswoman from Albuquerque, New Mexico. Born in Wyoming, she moved to New Mexico at age seven and grew up rafting, backpacking, and canoeing with her father, who was raised on the Navajo Nation. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} season 15, surviving the jungle of Rupununi, Guyana with partner Justin Governale in the episode {{ep:No Holds Barred}}.

name: Karen Coffee
bio: Karen Coffee is a Chatham County, North Carolina mother of two, fitness enthusiast, hunter, and competitive equestrian jumper. She spent 21 days surviving the Philippine jungle with partner Matt Alexander on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, in the episode {{ep:Contamination}}, which aired in April 2016.

name: Karra Falkenstein
bio: Karra Falkenstein is an endurance athlete and IT developer from the Milwaukee/Madison, Wisconsin area who also teaches naked yoga and enjoys obstacle races and marathons. She tested her survival skills on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in Jalapao, Brazil, appearing in episodes including {{ep:Forbidden Fruit}} and {{ep:Unsurvivable}}.

name: Kat Sibley
bio: Kat Sibley is an endurance athlete from Louisiana who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the episode {{ep:Sibling Survival}}, which aired in March 2022. She was paired with South African Warrick Harvey in Zambia after his brother had to medically tap out of the challenge.

name: Kate Wentworth
bio: Kate Wentworth is an earth-skills instructor and off-grid homesteader based on 18 acres in Passadumkeag, Maine. She is a two-time {{series:Naked and Afraid}} contestant, including the episode {{ep:No Safety in Numbers}}, and runs Bear Hand Necessities, a small business making zero-waste salves and balms from rendered bear tallow.

name: Kayla Groves
bio: Kayla Groves is a fan survivalist who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the episode {{ep:Gag Me with a Turtle}}, which aired August 29, 2021. She was one of two fans cast for a brutal 21-day attempt in South Africa.

name: Keenan Williams
bio: Keenan Williams is an amateur herpetologist whose life mission is to present snakes, reptiles, and amphibians in a more positive light. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the episode {{ep:Unbreakable}} (Season 17), where he attempted 21 days in the Colombian wilderness alongside an equestrian stunt rider. He tapped on Day 5, citing his inability to bring himself to kill a tortoise the pair had found.

name: Keith Busch
bio: Keith Busch is a survivalist from the Seattle, Washington area who appeared in four episodes of {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2014. His credits include {{ep:Paradise Lost}}, in which two survivalists were dropped on a deserted Fijian island for 21 days.

name: Kellie Nightlinger
bio: Kellie Nightlinger is an Alaska-based adventure guide, captain, and survival instructor who, with partner EJ Snyder, was part of the very first duo cast on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}. She founded Wild Woman Outdoors and runs a free youth adventure camp in Michigan's Upper Peninsula for kids who have lost a parent or experienced foster care or abuse.

name: Kelly Roske
bio: Kelly Roske, nicknamed Mama Kel, is a survivalist and digital creator who has divided her time between Hawaii and Mexico. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the episode {{ep:Stalked on All Sides}}, finishing her 21-day challenge in South Africa alone after her partner left on day four. She has since returned for {{series:Naked and Afraid: Apocalypse}}.

name: Ken Stornes
bio: Ken Stornes is a Norwegian infantry combat veteran and former national Taekwondo champion who styles himself as a modern-day Viking adventurer. He set a world record for the highest dodsing (death dive) and went viral for jumping off a snowy cliff while holding two battle axes. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} as a survivalist in the 2024 episode {{ep:There Will Be Blood}}.

name: Kerra Bennett
bio: Kerra Bennett is a wildlife biologist and U.S. Army veteran from Nashville, Tennessee, who previously served as a Counterintelligence Special Agent and worked as a zookeeper at the Nashville Zoo. She appeared on Season 14 of {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the episode {{ep:Valley of the Leopards}}, and was also cast on {{series:Naked and Afraid: Castaways}}.

name: Kim Kelly
bio: Kim Kelly is a river guide, rock climber, mountain biker, and mother from Utah who graduated from Utah State University in 2018 with a B.S. in Recreation Resource Management. She has competed across multiple {{series:Naked and Afraid}} franchises, with challenges in South Africa, Panama, and Belize, plus appearances on {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid: Alone}}.

name: Kim Shelton
bio: Kim Shelton is a wilderness-skills practitioner originally from Bemidji, Minnesota, and a graduate of the Wilderness Awareness School's Anake program. At 22, she was one of two survivalists in the very first episode of {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, spending 21 days in remote Costa Rica with partner Shane Lewis after their shelter famously burned down in the night.

name: Kristin Young
bio: Kristin Young is an oncology nurse and mother of two from Mt. Gilead, Ohio. She was selected through a fan challenge to appear on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the episode {{ep:Easier Said Than Done}}, taking on a 14-day attempt in Nicaragua's Chocoyero-El Brujo Natural Reserve with partner Paolo Di Girolamo II.

name: Ky Furneaux
bio: Ky Furneaux is an Australian-born Hollywood stunt performer, survival expert, author, and motivational speaker who recovered from a fractured spine at age 19 to forge a career doubling for stars including Jaimie Alexander, Anne Hathaway, and Jennifer Garner. She won the 2012 Taurus World Stunt Award for Best Female Stunt Performer for her work in Thor. She holds the record for most {{series:Naked and Afraid}} appearances by a woman, debuting in the Louisiana bayou episode {{ep:Beware the Bayou}}.

name: Kyle Hennington
bio: Kyle Hennington is a survivalist from Hamburg, Arkansas, and a graduate of Arkansas Tech University. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2024 episode {{ep:Poison Control}}, enduring 21 days in Colombia while contending with injuries and toxic frogs.

name: Kyle Malo
bio: Kyle Malo is a {{series:Naked and Afraid}} superfan who, along with podcaster MaLu Beyonce, was cast as an armchair-survivalist critic in the 2024 episode {{ep:Put Up or Shut Up}}. The pair attempted to put their fan knowledge to the test over 14 days in the Colombian jungle, where they were swarmed by insects.

name: Kyle Oelofse
bio: Kyle Oelofse is a South African survivalist and father who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the Season 9 episode {{ep:Trouble in Paradise}}. He and partner Rylie attempted 21 days in the rainforest on the north coast of Honduras, contending with torrential downpours and wind storms.

name: Lacey Jones
bio: Lacey Stark-Jones is a U.S. Army Iraq War veteran who grew up off-grid as the oldest of five children on Quigg Island in Liberty, Maine, attending survivalist school as a teen. She and her husband Cody, also a veteran, live in Du Quoin, Illinois with their two kids and run a family firearms shop. She is an all-star across the franchise, with appearances on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, {{series:Naked and Afraid: Alone}}, and {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}}.

name: Larry Little
bio: Larry Little is a paramedic from Kentucky who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2018 episode {{ep:Thieves in the Night}}, partnered with a Seattle fashion producer for a 21-day attempt.

name: Laura Thompson-Nelson
bio: Laura Thompson-Nelson is a U.S. Air Force veteran and service auditor from McAllen, Texas, with formal survival training. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} during a 21-day Australian Outback challenge with partner Nicklas Lautakoski, where freezing temperatures and partner conflict ultimately ended her run.

name: Laura Zerra
bio: Laura Zerra is a Western Massachusetts-born survivalist, knifemaker, and author who studied ethnobiology at Connecticut College before teaching primitive skills at Connecticut's Great Hollow Wilderness School and traveling solo through Mexico and Australia. She debuted on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2013 in Bocas del Toro, Panama, and returned for the Peruvian Amazon and 40 days in Colombia for Season 1 of {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}. She published the book A Modern Guide to Knife-making in 2018.

name: Laurae Hughes
bio: Laurae Hughes is a survivalist from Chimacum, Washington who appeared in two episodes of {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2020, including {{ep:Snow Daze}}. Her debut challenge was shot in the Sierra de Juarez mountains of Baja, Mexico, where she was paired with Canadian Christopher James.

name: Lauren Beihoffer
bio: Lauren Beihoffer is a former scientist turned ultra-runner and endurance coach whose work includes adventure racing, mountaineering, and Fastest Known Time attempts. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2023 episode {{ep:Odd Man Out}}, a four-person challenge in Zambia.

name: Lauren Fagen
bio: Lauren Fagen is a survivalist best known as a survivor of a 2013 lion attack at the Moholoholo Wildlife Rehabilitation Centre in South Africa, where she was dragged into a cage as an 18-year-old volunteer and saved by another volunteer. She returned to Africa to face her fears on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2020 episode {{ep:Biting Back at Africa}}, a four-person challenge.

name: Leah Chandler
bio: Leah Chandler is a survivalist and mother from Dry Prong, Louisiana who believes adventure should be a life priority. She has appeared multiple times on the {{series:Naked and Afraid}} franchise, including a Croatia challenge and the South Africa season of {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, plus {{series:Naked and Afraid: Tough as a Mother}}.

name: Leah McCabe
bio: Leah McCabe is an outdoor enthusiast and health and fitness mentor who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2018 episode {{ep:Love at First Fight}}. She and partners Wes Heustess and James Lewis attempted to survive in the jungles of Isla Zapatera, Nicaragua, contending with flash floods, jaguars, vampire bats, and bull sharks.

name: Leah Olszewski
bio: Leah Olszewski is a U.S. Army Reserves officer, public speaker, and co-founder of FEMTAC who advocates for domestic violence survivors. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2019 episode {{ep:Meltdown on the Mountain}}, where she and partner Tommy Brown faced extreme temperature swings, territorial pumas, and fer-de-lance snakes in high-altitude Colombian jungle.

name: LeAnn Duncan
bio: LeAnn Duncan is an Alaska-born accountant from the Anchorage area who served a decade in the U.S. Army (active duty and Reserves). Raised by an outdoorsy family with homesteading roots, she dipnets, hunts and fishes throughout Alaska. She competed on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} including {{ep:Burnt to a Crisp}} alongside fellow survivalist Lee Diehl.

name: Lee Diehl
bio: Lee Diehl is a Texas-based survivalist and self-described country boy who hunts, fishes and four-wheels in his spare time. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2018, including the episodes {{ep:Unsurvivable}} and {{ep:Burnt to a Crisp}}.

name: Lee Trew
bio: Lee Trew is an Australian bushcraft instructor, psychotherapist and rewilding mentor based around Jervis Bay, New South Wales. He studied primitive survival at Tom Brown Jr.'s Tracker School and Practical Primitive in the US and co-founded Bluegum Bushcraft, which runs family rewilding camps on the Clyde River. He completed the 21-day Croatia challenge on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in {{ep:From the Ashes}} with partner Stacey Osorio.

name: Lilly Jammerbund
bio: Lilly Jammerbund, better known as Survival Lilly, is a self-taught Austrian survivalist and YouTube creator born in Vienna. She launched her Survival Lilly channel in 2011 and runs the site survivallilly.at. She joined {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2023.

name: Lincoln Samuelson
bio: Lincoln Samuelson is an outdoorsman who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2021, paired with Emily Caselman for the Texas desert episode {{ep:A Tangled Web in Texas}}.

name: Lindsay Boisclair
bio: Lindsay Boisclair is a single mom from Grand Blanc, Michigan, who works in customer service and is an avid outdoors enthusiast. She appeared as a survivalist on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} starting in 2016, including {{ep:Hell or High Water}}, where she and Matt Wright completed a 21-day challenge in Thailand's Sai Rung River Valley.

name: Lindsey Leitelt
bio: Lindsey Leitelt is a survivalist and nutrition consultant from Pine Mountain Club, California, and a married mother of two sons. She debuted on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2014 with {{ep:Primal Fear}}, returned for {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, and joined {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}} in season 2.

name: Lisa Coray
bio: Lisa Coray is a pediatrician from Salem, Massachusetts whose skills include natural shelter building, primitive fire making and identifying bird songs and trees. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2014, notably in {{ep:Argentina Impossible}}, partnered with Tom McElroy in the rain-soaked Argentine jungle.

name: Lisa Hagan
bio: Lisa Hagan, the self-styled "Cajun Mermaid," is a former U.S. Army National Guard medic who works as an ER nurse in Louisiana and a charter boat captain (Nauti Cajun Charters) in the Florida Keys. A two-time breast cancer survivor, she joined {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2020 for {{ep:In Too Deep}}, a 25-mile trek across the Andros Island chain.

name: Luke McLaughlin
bio: Luke McLaughlin is a naturalist, primitive-skills teacher and rewilding mentor who founded Holistic Survival School near Asheville, North Carolina. He has appeared multiple times across {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid: Alone}}.

name: Lynsey McCarver
bio: Lynsey McCarver is a veterinary technician and mother of three from Kellogg, Idaho (Silver Valley). After producers discovered her hunting and foraging videos in a North Idaho women's hiking group, she first competed on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2021 in South Africa's Lapala wilderness and returned in 2024 for the 40-day Colombia season of {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}.

name: Maci Bookout
bio: Maci Bookout is a reality-television personality from Chattanooga, Tennessee, best known as one of the original cast members of MTV's 16 and Pregnant and Teen Mom OG. A mother of three, she joined {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2018 for a 14-day Nicaragua challenge with Justin Tuell but tapped out on day two.

name: Makani Nalu
bio: Makani Nalu, born Natalie Paul in Worcester, Massachusetts, left home at 17 for Hawaii, where she took her current name (meaning "the wind") and worked organic farms via WWOOF. Now a Malibu-based yoga instructor, she won the debut season of CBS's Stranded with a Million Dollars in 2017 before appearing on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} season 10 and {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}.

name: Malik Nyasha
bio: Malik Nyasha is a blacksmith and metalworker behind Mythic Metalworks. He joined {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2025 for {{ep:Enter the Queen}}, a 21-day Yucatan, Mexico challenge mentored by series legend Laura Zerra.

name: Malorie Ann
bio: Malorie Ann Romero is a dental hygienist and single mom from San Antonio, Texas, with a heavy outdoor resume of hunting, fishing, hiking and camping. Producers spotted her online presence and cast her on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, where in summer 2022 she completed a 21-day Argentina challenge, including the episode {{ep:No Gear, No Fear}}.

name: Malu Beyonce
bio: Maria Lucy "MaLu" Beyonce is a Pittsburg, Texas native and co-host of the Naked and Afraid recap podcast Oh Heck Naa. A self-described superfan, she has appeared as a survivalist on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} including {{ep:Put Up or Shut Up}}, taking on a Colombian jungle fan challenge.

name: Manu Toigo
bio: Manu Toigo is an Australian survivalist and television host from Queensland, raised on a sugar cane farm outside Ingham and an 8-year veteran of the Royal Australian Army Reserve (31 RQR). She debuted on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2013 with the Panama double-episode {{ep:Double Jeopardy}} and returned for {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} in the Philippines in 2019. She now runs Walkabout Ranch and a youth wilderness program in California.

name: Maria Corrales
bio: Maria Corrales is a survivalist who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2017, including the Australian outback episode {{ep:The Monster}}, where she faced harsh conditions, scarce food and saltwater crocodiles.

name: Marissa Joy
bio: Marissa Joy Binkoski is an outdoors enthusiast and birding photographer who appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2022 in {{ep:Abandoned Village}}, a 21-day challenge in Botswana's Okavango Delta. She has said the experience rekindled her love of birding.

name: Marlin Sims
bio: Marlin "So Icey" Sims is a professional boxer (record 8-3, 4 KO) born in Chicago, raised in Minneapolis and based in Tampa, Florida. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in April 2024, taking on a 21-day South African jungle challenge.

name: Matt Alexander
bio: Matt Alexander is a truck driver, leather-worker and knife-maker from Jennings, Louisiana, with a background in hunting and tracking. He completed a 21-day Philippines challenge on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2016 and returned for {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, where he tapped out due to a foot injury.

name: Matt Garland
bio: Matt Garland is a survivalist from Benton, Arkansas. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} across two episodes in 2021-2022, starting with the season premiere on April 4, 2021.

name: Matt Strutzel
bio: Matt Strutzel is a blacksmith and primitive-skills instructor from Portland, Oregon. He appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} across three episodes in 2014-2015, including {{ep:Dunes of Despair}}, completing a challenge in Brazil's North Region while his partner Honora Bowen tapped out from heat exhaustion.

name: Matt Wright
bio: Matt "Savage" Wright is a U.S. Air Force veteran, custom knife maker and survival instructor who founded Extreme Instinct in 2005, with locations in Colorado and Florida. Nicknamed "The Juggernaut," he's a regular across {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}}. He works alongside his wife and fellow survivalist {{survivor:Brooke Wright}}.

name: Max Djenohan
bio: Max "Nomadik Max" Djenohan is a Seattle-area snowboarder and outdoorsman who grew up in Shoreline and lives in Edmonds, Washington. He has completed six Discovery survival runs totaling 177 days across four continents, including {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, {{series:Naked and Afraid: Alone}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}}, plus NBC's Race to Survive Alaska. His personal site is maxdjenohan.com.

name: McKenzie Clark
bio: McKenzie Clark is a surfer and diver who lives on the Big Island of Hawaii. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} across three episodes in 2016-2017, including {{ep:Texan Torture}} with Scott Thompson, and was known on the show for crafting plant-fiber and deer-hide footwear.

name: Megan Krugger
bio: Megan Krugger is a science teacher from East Bridgewater, Massachusetts. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2024 in {{ep:Colombian Cave Women}}, an all-female tribe challenge in Colombia where she ate live termites and slept in a bat cave before a medical tap-out at day five (later diagnosed with salmonella and plesiomonas).

name: Megan Sunny Forsythe
bio: Megan "Sunny" Forsythe is a survivalist from Vancouver Island (Parksville, British Columbia). She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2024 in {{ep:Runaway Bride}}, partnering with British commando Steven Kelly for a 21-day Colombian jungle challenge, motivated in part by grieving her father.

name: Meghann Harris
bio: Meghann Harris is a mother, alternative model and leather-smith who runs Meggabyte Leather and has been working with leather for about a decade. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in 2021 in {{ep:Sand Trapped}}, paired with biologist Dan Link in Mexico's Chihuahua Desert.

name: Melanie Rauscher
bio: Melanie Rauscher was a U.S. Navy veteran and Prescott VA Medical Center employee from Prescott, Arizona, and an avid outdoor enthusiast. She appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} season 7 and on {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}. She died in July 2022 at age 35.
